query:
SELECT c.id as client_id, c.name as client_name, c.email as client_email,
       sp.id as package_id, sp.package_type, sp.sessions_total
FROM clients c
JOIN session_packages sp ON sp.client_id = c.id
WHERE c.trainer_id = 13
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL
  AND c.email != ''
LIMIT 5;
